mapper.select: select document_id, project_id, document_category_id, version_id, milestone_id, created_by, title, description, setting_code_id status_code, status_name, created_at from document ORDER BY document_id DESC

select count(*) over() as total_cnt, h.document_history_id, h.document_id, h.created_by, u.user_name, h.title, h.description, h.status_code, h.status_name, h.created_at, h.document_version_id from document_history h LEFT JOIN users u ON h.created_by = u.user_id WHERE h.document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY h.document_history_id DESC

select count(*) over() as total_cnt, d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, d.created_by, u.user_name, d.title, d.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name, d.created_at from document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id WHERE document_category_id IS NULL AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY d.document_id DESC

select count(*) over() as total_cnt, d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, c.category_name, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, d.created_by, u.user_name, d.title, d.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name from document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN document_category c ON d.document_category_id = c.document_category_id WHERE d.document_category_id = #{documentCategoryId} ORDER BY d.document_id DESC

select d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, c.category_name, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, d.created_by, u.user_name, d.title, d.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name, d.document_version_id from document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN document_category c ON d.document_category_id = c.document_category_id WHERE d.document_id = #{documentId}

select d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, c.category_name, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, h.created_by, u.user_name, h.title, h.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name, h.document_version_id from document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN document_category c ON d.document_category_id = c.document_category_id LEFT JOIN document_history h ON d.document_id = h.document_id WHERE h.document_history_id = #{documentHistoryId}
select count(*) over() as total_cnt, document_category_id, project_id, category_name from document_category WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY document_category_id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'DOCUMENT_CATEGORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(document_category_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM document_category WHERE document_category_id LIKE 'DOCUMENT_CATEGORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
insert into document_category ( document_category_id, project_id, category_name ) values ( #{documentCategoryId}, #{projectId}, #{categoryName} )

SELECT 'DOCUMENT_HISTORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(document_history_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM document_history WHERE document_history_id LIKE 'DOCUMENT_HISTORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
insert into document_history ( document_history_id, document_id, created_by, title, description,
status_code,
status_name,
document_version_id
) values ( #{documentHistoryId}, #{documentId}, #{createdBy}, #{title}, #{description},
#{statusCode},
#{statusName},
#{documentVersionId} )
mapper.select: SELECT h.document_history_id, d.document_id, d.project_id, d.document_category_id, c.category_name, d.version_id, v.version_name, d.milestone_id, m.title AS milestone_title, h.created_by, u.user_name, h.title, h.description, d.setting_code_id, d.status_code, d.status_name, h.document_version_id FROM document d LEFT JOIN milestone m ON d.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN project_version v ON d.version_id = v.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.created_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN document_category c ON d.document_category_id = c.document_category_id LEFT JOIN document_history h ON d.document_id = h.document_id WHERE h.document_id = #{documentId} AND h.document_version_id = ( SELECT MAX(document_version_id) FROM document_history WHERE document_id = #{documentId} )
